content: Implement TASK-074 evidence-independence-audit: a safe_read verifier that classifies evidence independence and fails when release-signoff evidence is only maker-authored or self-attested. Verification gate: low-independence fixture must fail plus unit tests and command help metadata. Stop condition: audit-only scope; do not integrate into release-state-audit until TASK-075. QIF boundary: audit pass is structural/runtime evidence of evidence independence, not proof of semantic truth.
